name: SKELETON_PATHWAY__MEMBER_LOOKUP__ASSIGNEE__YEAR_2024
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering 2024 assignees constrained by pathway.
cypher_template:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10
examples: Which companies entered target-pair combinations containing Lysosome Vesicle Biogenesis targets in 2024?
Which companies entered target-pair combinations containing Synthesis, secretion, and inactivation of Glucagon-like Peptide-1 (GLP-1) targets in 2024?
Which companies entered target-pair combinations containing Transcriptional Regulation by VENTX targets in 2024?
